title.en: Table 4.4: Administrative expenditure as a percentage of total expenditure (2019-20 to 2022-23)

summary.en: Year-wise administrative expenses and total expenditure of the Delhi BOCW Welfare Board from 2019-20 to 2022-23, with administrative expenditure as a percentage of total expenditure. Administrative expenses as a percentage ranged from 1.52 to 11.01 per cent, exceeding the statutory five per cent ceiling in 2019-20 (7.19%) and 2020-21 (11.01%) and 2022-23 (7.67%), indicating persistent non-compliance with Section 24(3) of the BOCW Act.

label.en: Administrative expenditure as a percentage of total expenditure

notes.en: Statutory ceiling on administrative expenditure is five per cent of total expenditure as per Section 24(3) of the BOCW Act, 1996. Years 2019-20, 2020-21 and 2022-23 exceeded this limit.
